name: Cannoli for Kids!
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, use an electric mixer set to low speed to beat together the ricotta cheese, confectioners' sugar, grated orange peel, and vanilla extract until smooth.
2. Stir in the mini chocolate chips.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. To serve, scoop the filling into the ice-cream cones or transfer it to a decorating bag without a tip. Pipe the filling into the cones.
Prep time: 10 minutes
Total time: 40 minutes
